summary.key_theme: Tesla 憑藉在中國推出全自動駕駛 (FSD) 技術以及 SpaceX IPO 帶來的潛在估值溢價，抵銷了印度建廠計畫取消的負面影響。

bullish.title: Tesla brings 'Full Self-Driving (Supervised)' to China after years of delays as local EV rivals race ahead
bullish.reason: 在中國市場推出 FSD 技術是 Tesla 軟體變現與自動駕駛戰略的重大里程碑，有助於在競爭激烈的中國 EV 市場中建立技術護城河。

bullish.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: Tesla — TSLA could see a major boost from SpaceX's June IPO
bullish.reason: 市場預期 SpaceX 的 IPO 將提升 Tesla 持有其股份的帳面價值，並強化 Elon Musk 旗下生態系的協同效應。

bullish.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market Bets On Iran Deal; Tesla, These Five AI Plays Are At Buy Points
bullish.reason: 技術面分析指出 Tesla 股價已接近買入點，且市場情緒受總體經濟利多帶動，有利於股價表現。

bullish.title: Is Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) One of the Best ARK Stocks to Buy Right Now?
bullish.reason: 獲得知名基金 ARK 的青睞與買入評級，反映了機構投資者對其長期成長潛力的信心。

bearish.title: Tesla News On India Exit Recall And SpaceX Links Tests Valuation
bearish.reason: 正式取消印度建廠計畫，顯示 Tesla 在新興市場的擴張策略受挫，可能影響長期產能規劃。

bearish.title: Tesla Is Chasing the Future of Driving. Its Stock Is Stuck in a 350x Earnings Trap
bearish.reason: 分析師指出高達 350 倍的本益比 (P/E) 存在估值過高的風險，若自動駕駛技術無法快速變現，股價恐面臨修正。

bearish.title: Tesla Robotaxi Problems in Texas: What Could It Mean for TSLA Stock?
bearish.reason: Robotaxi 在德州面臨執行問題，凸顯了自動駕駛技術在落地過程中仍存在監管與技術挑戰。

neutral.title: Will Elon Musk eventually merge SpaceX with Tesla? Speculation is building
neutral.reason: 關於合併兩家公司的猜測目前僅停留在市場傳言階段，缺乏實質證據，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Ford Motor vs. Tesla: What Their Revenue Trends Tell Investors
neutral.reason: 僅為產業競爭對比分析，未提供具體影響 Tesla 股價的重大新消息。

neutral.title: Former Tesla president shares the secret to success he learned from his former boss, Elon Musk
neutral.reason: 關於企業文化與人才管理的訪談，屬於軟性新聞，對財務面無直接影響。
